creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
Hi Joel,

Which sample files do you believe are missing from net-mgmt/nagios?   
The port correctly installs all five sample files as dictated by the  
software package itself, namely cgi.cfg-sample, commands.cfg-sample,  
localhost.cfg-sample, nagios.cfg-sample and resource.cfg-sample.

Jarrod.
